'''Holoscanners''' were a type of scanner, capable of detecting dangerous or illegal items without the need for physical searches of individuals or [[Cargo container/Legends|cargo containers]]. They were used in [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] and high-security areas across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. These advanced scanners employ a mix of [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], [[energy receptor]]s, and [[Hologram/Legends|holoimaging]] to identify almost any type of [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] or contraband. Although certain rare materials like [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] or [[Nightshadow anti-sensor treatment|nightshadow]] can evade detection, attentive operators watch for such deceptions. Holoscanners vary in size and shape, from small devices for individual inspections to large machines designed to scan [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] and other sizable objects. The [[BAS44 Customs-Grade Holoscanner]], [[HB-2 holoscanner]], [[SecureScan 1500]], and [[7320/H scanning array]] were models of holoscanners manufactured by, respectively, [[BAS Research & Development]],<ref name="">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030814aargau2|series=Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs|text=Part 2: Secure Lines of Credit}}</ref> [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]], [[Tagge Corporation]], and [[Neuro-Saav Technologies/Legends|Neuro-Saav Technologies]].<ref name="Fly" />
